articles.title: Saputo Reshapes Argentina Exposure While Redirecting Cash To Higher Growth
articles.summary: Saputo (TSX:SAP) has agreed to sell 80% of its Argentina dairy business to Grupo Gloria, while keeping a 20% minority stake. The deal reshapes Saputo's international footprint and keeps the company involved in Argentina sourced products for export markets. Saputo, trading at CA$42.38, is coming to this transaction after a strong share price move, with a 1 year return of 78.7%.
